creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
Created attachment 255023
patch

This tool can be used to split flac image+cue to flac tracks using information stored in cue file. 

---
I pulled go.mod from upstream directly instead of go proxy because the version is strange https://pkg.go.dev/git.sr.ht/~ft/unflac?tab=versions I'm not even sure it corresponds to 1.3.

portlint gives 1 warning about too short pkg-descr, but I couldn't find official information that contains more than one line. It's simple utility that does it's job ><

Tested with poudriere testbuild against 14.1-RELEASE
